channel.title: Engineering on Home
channel.description: Recent content in Engineering on Home

item.title: Threat Modeling AI as an Engineering Coprocessor
item.description:
Threat Modeling AI as an Engineering Coprocessor Across the SDLC

Artificial intelligence is rapidly becoming embedded throughout modern software engineering workflows. AI systems are no longer confined to code completion in an IDE. They now participate in drafting requirements, suggesting architectures, generating code, producing tests, summarizing incidents, and assisting with communication.

item.title: AI SDLC: automating the grind
item.description:
The SDLC Is a GRIND

After enough years in software, I stopped pretending the Software Development Lifecycle was a clean, rational process.

Instead, I started calling it the GRIND:

A ritual cycle of optimism, ego, compromise, suffering, and damage control.
